leadText: The Twisted Spoon (Japanese: まがったスプーン Twisted Spoon), formatted TwistedSpoon prior to Generation VI, is a type of held item introduced in Generation II that boosts the power of Psychic-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves by 20%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Powers up psychic-type moves. (HOLD) R S E Colo XD A hold item that boosts Psychic -type moves. FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . A spoon imbued with telekinetic power boosts Psychic -type moves. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a spoon imbued with telekinetic power that boosts Psychic-type moves. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic power and boosts Psychic-type moves. S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.
